3306750.name: Realm of the Mad God: Free Starter Pack
3306750.description:
Ready to dive into the Realm and kick-start your adventure? Look no further! This welcome pack has everything you need to begin your journey with style and loot in mind. Hatch your mystery eggs to gain a loyal companion, boost your stats with potions, and unlock dungeons with keys to start collecting epic rewards. And of course, you’ll be able to do all of this in true fashion with some customization items for your character!

This pack contains:
  • 3x Common Mystery Eggs
  • 2x XP Booster
  • 1x Lucky Clover
  • 3x Loot Drop Potion
  • 1x Potion of Defense (SB)
  • 1x Potion of Life (SB)
  • 1x Potion of Attack (SB)
  • 1x Backpack
  • 1x Adventurer's Belt
  • 2x Greater Sulphur
  • 2x Greater Ore

Note: All items will be delivered to your regular Gift Chest (not seasonal) in the game after you buy this pack. Please wait a few minutes and re-launch the game to be able to see them.
3306750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
